title: BEM-871 probe response content
objective:
Run script:
"""
resp = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM871_CURATOR_MEDIATED_RESPONSE.md')
text = resp.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if resp.exists() else ''
flags = []
flags.append('exists_' + str(resp.exists()))
flags.append('status_' + str('Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES' in text))
flags.append('findings_' + str('Findings:' in text))
flags.append('evidence_' + str('Evidence:' in text))
flags.append('recommendation_' + str('Recommendation:' in text))
flags.append('len_' + str(len(text)))
safe = '_'.join(flags).replace('True','T').replace('False','F')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM871_RESPONSE_CONTENT_PROBE_' + safe + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-871 response content probe\nFlags: ' + safe + '\n\nText:\n' + text[:4000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM871 response content probe: ' + safe)
"""
No issue comments.
